title: Packs / Xananode Canonical / Assets / Raw / Protocol / Links / Tools
summary: packs/xananode-canonical/assets/raw/protocol/links/tools.md is preserved as a raw Core SDK source artifact in the XanaNode Core SDK substrate.
content:
# Tools

Potential tool categories for XanaNode:

- schema validators
- index builders
- merge validators
- namespace resolvers
- duplicate detectors
- relationship suggesters
- substrate importers/exporters
- repository validator: `tools/validate.py`

This repository may link to tools here rather than include every implementation directly.
